content_body: I wanted to spend my December birthday in a beautiful cabin in the mountains and this was the perfect place! The cabin is gorgeous and we had a fabulous time! The beds were super comfortable, the kitchen totally equipped, loved the pool table and the fireplaces! On our drive from Atlanta, we stopped to buy food supplies and we were set! One day, we ventured into the quaint town and shopped and grabbed a bite. Walmart was close by, so if you need anything, it's easy to get - although we never wanted to leave! We would definitely return and recommend this rental to anyone looking for a luxury cabin experience.
title: Would Definitely Return
